title: The GMP Complaint-Handling Process
alt: Five ordered stages of a GMP complaint-handling process from receipt to CAPA closure

items.label: Receipt & recording
items.desc: Log every complaint in one controlled system, ALCOA+ compliant

items.label: Triage & risk class
items.desc: Sort critical, major and minor using ICH Q9 principles

items.label: Investigation
items.desc: Check reference samples and the batch record and history

items.label: Root cause & impact
items.desc: Cover the complained batch and every batch sharing the cause

items.label: CAPA & closure
items.desc: Justified actions, clear conclusion and complainant response
